segments.text: Then Bildad the Shuhite answered and said:
How long will you speak these things, And the words of your mouth be like a strong wind?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Does God subvert judgment? Or does the Almighty pervert justice?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If your sons have sinned against Him, He has cast them away for their transgression.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If you would earnestly seek God And make your supplication to the Almighty,
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If you were pure and upright, Surely now He would awake for you, And prosper your rightful dwelling place.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Though your beginning was small, Yet your latter end would increase abundantly.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: For inquire, please, of the former age, And consider the things discovered by their fathers;
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: For we were born yesterday, and know nothing, Because our days on earth are a shadow.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Will they not teach you and tell you, And utter words from their heart?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Can the papyrus grow up without a marsh? Can the reeds flourish without water?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: While it is yet green and not cut down, It withers before any other plant.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: So are the paths of all who forget God; And the hope of the hypocrite shall perish,
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Whose confidence shall be cut off, And whose trust is a spider's web.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He leans on his house, but it does not stand. He holds it fast, but it does not endure.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He grows green in the sun, And his branches spread out in his garden.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: His roots wrap around the rock heap, And look for a place in the stones.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If he is destroyed from his place, Then it will deny him, saying, 'I have not seen you.'
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Behold, this is the joy of His way, And out of the earth others will grow.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Behold, God will not cast away the blameless, Nor will He uphold the evildoers.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: He will yet fill your mouth with laughing, And your lips with rejoicing.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Those who hate you will be clothed with shame, And the dwelling place of the wicked will come to nothing.
segments.speaker: Bildad
